{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232045033BAFEFCEC241A42B378A"}"},"total":20},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604377068742820670","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"赞👍🏻希望不要烂尾，或突然下架"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770534672,"group_id":"7596269063244876824","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzfk2dXNTMiBQHpUZUYW/D/w+5A7y67543k/Q9aLhIjZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/a3b802b7bf54417999b456df9ac237fc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792169&x-signature=Pzl%2Bguf4eFGCkKC6nv8zuAEJMdk%3D","user_id":"1103535783825463","user_name":"ze"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1103535783825463","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776434363,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7596269063244876824","book_info":{"abstract":"我，林峰，警界冉冉升起的新星，罪犯闻风丧胆的克星。
这，是同事们眼中的我。
实际上——我只想快点被开除啊！（破音）
【面对精英同事的鄙视】
王强（轻蔑）：“新人就该多跑腿，你就负责看几十个T的监控录像吧！”
我（内心狂喜）：太好了，带薪摸鱼！为了早点回家吃饭，我快进播放，顺便点了份外卖。
我（随口胡扯）：“我怀疑这宫保鸡丁有问题！”
结果：外卖订单组合起来竟是销赃路线图！案件告破！
王强（目瞪口呆）：“……”
【面对高冷法医的质疑】
苏晴妍（面无表情）：“你靠运气破案，这不科学。”
我（被迫加班，怨念深重）：为了快点结案，我对着证物闻了闻，吐槽道：“这蘑菇不新鲜啊。”
结果：苏晴妍根据“蘑菇”方向，在死者体内检测出罕见生物毒素，连环投毒案真相大白！
苏晴妍（眼神发亮）：“你……是个天才。有兴趣探讨一下我的家族悬案吗？”
看着被强制调入市局刑侦总队，还要被美女拉着研究案情的自己，林峰只想说：毁灭吧，赶紧的！累了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b727c48bf4ef25c0985f9328a7c2a782","author":"混混猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7596269063244876824","book_name":"咸鱼神探：我真没想立功啊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1875人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7596277230402028056","read_count":"1875","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"352525"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"177","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,神豪,系统,打脸,单女主,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d72076d3bd13dfeda156d9f5d3b70653~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453903&x-signature=RkU01wjYwcHI8IGkm5LZbMRmePE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"582085289719849","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_rea
